description: Enabling raw-data retention before the continuous aggregate covers the window, permanently losing fine-grained history.
body: Failure mode: retention drops raw chunks before the downsampled rollup is materialized for that range, so neither raw nor aggregate has the data. Detection signals: gaps in long-range dashboards; aggregate buckets missing for periods just past raw retention. Do not enable raw retention without verifying aggregate coverage. Safer fallback: confirm the continuous aggregate is populated past the retention boundary, then enable retention; restore from backup if already lost.
